svg.title: MX Ergo — LinguaX slot layout
svg.desc: Top-down photo of the MX Ergo trackball with LinguaX-mappable slots labelled: M wheel click, S1 side button (Back), S2 side button (Forward). The thumb ball and the Precision (DPI) button are shown for reference but are not LinguaX slots — the ball drives the cursor, the DPI button is firmware-controlled.

g.text: DPI · firmware-only, not a LinguaX slot

svg.text: MX Ergo — 3 mappable slots (M · S1 · S2) via universal HID engine
